title: Fix Queue.drain returns items in LIFO order instead of FIFO
fail_to_pass: drain returns items in FIFO order
pass_to_pass: enqueue adds items to the queue
problem_statement: The Queue class in src/queue.ts implements drain() using array.pop(), which removes from the end (LIFO). Fix it so drain() returns items in the order they were enqueued (FIFO), consistent with standard queue semantics.
